form.label: SafeLine — Bot & JA4 Analysis
form.description: TLS fingerprint analysis (JA4), bot detection, automated traffic identification.

search.query: `safeline_waf` site_url=* | stats count by site_url site_name | sort - count
`safeline_waf` $site_tok$ ja4_fingerprint=* | stats count by ja4_fingerprint | where count=1 | stats count
`safeline_waf` $site_tok$ user_agent=* | eval ua_short = substr(user_agent,1,80) | top limit=15 ua_short

`safeline_waf` $site_tok$ ja4_fingerprint=* | stats count AS hits count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked dc(src_ip) AS sources dc(user_agent) AS distinct_uas values(user_agent) AS user_agents values(attack_type) AS attack_types by ja4_fingerprint tls_ja4_family | where hits<=50 AND (attacks>0 OR distinct_uas>1) | sort - attacks - hits | head 50

`safeline_waf` $site_tok$ user_agent=* | where match(lower(user_agent),"bot|crawler|spider|scraper|scan|nikto|sqlmap|nmap|wget|curl|python|go-http|java/") | stats count AS requests count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks count(eval(blocked=1)) AS blocked dc(src_ip) AS sources dc(site_url) AS sites_hit values(attack_type) AS attack_types latest(_time) AS last_seen by user_agent | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen,"%F %T") | sort - requests | head 25

table.title: UA / JA4 mismatch (single UA, many JA4 — possible spoofing)

search.query: `safeline_waf` $site_tok$ user_agent=* ja4_fingerprint=* | stats dc(ja4_fingerprint) AS ja4_count dc(src_ip) AS sources count AS requests values(ja4_fingerprint) AS fingerprints by user_agent | where ja4_count>=3 AND sources<=10 | sort - ja4_count - requests | head 25

table.title: JA4 / UA mismatch (one JA4, many UAs)

search.query: `safeline_waf` $site_tok$ user_agent=* ja4_fingerprint=* | stats dc(user_agent) AS ua_count dc(src_ip) AS sources count AS requests values(user_agent) AS user_agents by ja4_fingerprint | where ua_count>=5 AND sources<=20 | sort - ua_count | head 25

`safeline_waf` $site_tok$ (NOT user_agent=* OR user_agent="") | stats count AS requests count(eval(is_attack=1)) AS attacks dc(urlpath) AS paths values(method) AS methods latest(_time) AS last_seen by src_ip src_country | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%F %T") | sort - attacks - requests | head 25

chart.title: Bot vs human traffic over time

search.query: `safeline_waf` $site_tok$ user_agent=* | eval class = case( match(lower(user_agent),"bot|crawler|spider|scraper|scan|nikto|sqlmap|nmap|wget|curl|python|go-http|java/"), "bot", true(), "human") | timechart count by class
